title: Tax Associate
description: Allstate, one of America's leading insurers, seeks a Tax Associate for our Tampa service center. You'll support corporate tax compliance, prepare tax filings, and conduct tax research for Allstate's insurance operations. This role combines technical tax expertise with exposure to a Fortune 500 company's complex tax strategy. Working onsite in Tampa, you'll grow your tax career with structured mentorship and advancement opportunities.
responsibilities: Prepare corporate income tax returns and supporting documentation
Conduct tax research on multistate tax issues and insurance-specific regulations
Maintain tax compliance calendars and monitor filing deadlines
Assist with tax provision analysis and estimated quarterly tax calculations
Organize and maintain tax workpapers and compliance documentation
Support tax planning initiatives and coordinate with external tax advisors

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
skills: Tax knowledge including federal and state tax concepts
Proficiency in Excel and tax software

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Onsite fitness center and dining options
